info.title: Alchemyst AI API v1 documentation
info.description: v1 API documentation for Alchemyst AI

query.example: What did the customer ask about pricing for the Scale plan?

content.description: The content of the context item

contexts.content: Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.

delete.description:
Attempts to cancel a context add job by job id.
- If the job is already completed or failed, returns 404.
- If the job is currently running ("active"), returns 409 and cannot be cancelled.
- Only jobs in "waiting" or "delayed" state can be cancelled.

404.description: Job not found or already completed/failed

409.description: Job is currently running and cannot be cancelled

error.example: Context add is running, it cannot be cancelled. You can delete it after it has finished uploading, to preserve the integrity of data.

get.summary: Get status of a context add job
get.description: Returns the status and result of a context add job by job id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID to check status for

post.summary: Asynchronously queue context data to add to the context processor
post.description: This endpoint accepts context data and queues it for asynchronous processing by the context processor. It returns a success or error response depending on the queuing result.

documents.description: Array of documents with content and additional metadata

source.description: The source of the context data

groupName.description: Array of Group Name to which the file belongs to

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes

documents.content: Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.

404.description: Not Found - Invalid context data format

get.summary: List all ongoing context add jobs for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns all jobs (active, waiting, delayed, failed, completed) belonging to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of jobs to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of jobs to skip before starting to collect the result set

post.summary: Add context data to the context processor
post.description: This endpoint accepts context data and sends it to a context processor for further handling. It returns a success or error response depending on the result from the context processor.

documents.description: Array of documents with content and additional metadata

source.description: The source of the context data

groupName.description: Array of Group Name to which the file belongs to

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes

documents.content: Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.

404.description: Not Found - Invalid context data format

post.summary: Delete context data from the context processor
post.description: This endpoint deletes context data based on the provided parameters. It returns a success or error response depending on the result from the context processor.
This endpoint adds memory (chat history) as context.

contents.description: Array of content objects. Each object must contain at least the 'content' field. Additional properties are allowed.

content.description: The content of the memory message

metadata.description: Optional metadata for the memory context. Defaults to ["default"] if not provided.

groupName.description: Optional group names for the memory context. Defaults to ["default"] if not provided.

contents.content: Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.
Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.
Agent responded with pricing details for Scale plan.
Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.

post.description: Deletes memory context data based on provided parameters.

memoryId.description: The ID of the memory to delete

post.summary: Search for context data in the context processor
post.description: This endpoint sends a search request to the context processor to retrieve relevant context data based on the provided query.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description:
Controls whether metadata is included in the response:
- metadata=true → metadata will be included in each context item in the response.
- metadata=false (or omitted) → metadata will be excluded from the response for better performance.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description:
Controls the search mode:
- mode=fast → prioritizes speed over completeness.
- mode=standard → performs a comprehensive search (default if omitted).

user_id.description: The ID of the user making the request

query.description: The search query used to search for context data

simple.summary: Search without metadata filters (metadata=false or omitted)

value.query: What did the customer ask about pricing for the Scale plan?
What did the customer ask about pricing for the Scale plan?

202.description: Context search request successfully processed. Response structure varies based on metadata query parameter: if metadata=true, each context includes metadata; if metadata=false or omitted, metadata is excluded from the response.

metadata.description: Only included when query parameter metadata=true

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid or missing search parameters

402.description: Payment Required - User not allowed to perform action

post.description: This endpoint updates memory context data.

sessionId.description: The ID of the memory to update

content.description: The content of the memory entry

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the memory entry

role.description: Role of the message (e.g., user, assistant)

contents.content: Customer asked about pricing for the Scale plan.
Updated answer about the Scale plan pricing after discounts.

post.summary: Search context and generate an LLM-powered answer
post.description:
This endpoint performs a context search using the context processor, joins all
matching context chunks into a single string, then sends that joined context
along with the user's query to an LLM to produce a
natural-language answer grounded in the retrieved context.

By default the response only includes the generated `answer`. Pass
`?context=true` to also receive the joined context string that was used to
ground the answer.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description:
Controls the search mode:
- mode=fast -> prioritizes speed over completeness.
- mode=standard -> performs a comprehensive search (default if omitted).

parameters.name: context
parameters.description:
When set to `true`, the response includes the joined `context` string used
to ground the answer. Defaults to `false` (only `answer`, `model`, and
`usage` are returned).

user_id.description: The ID of the user making the request

steeringPrompt.description: The steering prompt for the query - basically the way in which you want to get your answer as.
steeringPrompt.example: Return only the basic details of the person in a structured JSON schema with the fields "name", "status", "location"

query.description: The search query and question to be answered using retrieved context
query.example: What did the customer ask about pricing for the Scale plan?

value.query: What did the customer ask about pricing for the Scale plan?
What did the customer ask about pricing for the Scale plan?

200.description: Successfully retrieved context and generated an answer.

answer.description: The LLM-generated answer based on the retrieved context

context.description:
The joined context retrieved from the context processor.
Only present when the request was made with `?context=true`.

usage.description: Token usage information from the LLM

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid or missing search parameters

402.description: Payment Required - User not allowed to perform action

patch.summary: Update a member's role in an organization
patch.description: Updates the role of a specific member within an organization. The user performing this action must be the 'owner' of the organization. The target member's role cannot be 'owner'.

memberId.description: The user ID of the member whose role is to be updated.

role.description: The new role for the member.

400.description: Bad Request - Missing required fields, invalid role, or invalid ID format.

message.example: Missing required fields: organizationId, memberId, role

402.description: Payment Required - User's subscription is not valid.

403.description: Forbidden - User does not have 'owner' role, or is trying to change the role of an owner.

404.description: Not Found - The target member was not found in the organization.
